name: Onion Dill Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients and egg in an inner pan.
2. Warm and add the following in order:
- 1/4 cup Water
- 3/4 cup Cottage Cheese
- 3/4 cup Sour cream
- 3 tablespoons Sugar
- 3 tablespoons Dried onion, minced
- 2 tablespoons Dill seed, whole
- 1 1/2 tablespoons Butter
3. Select white bread on the machine and press start.
4. Optionally, lightly brush the top with melted butter before baking.
